full_text:
Update about benchmarking:

- 99.9 percentile could improve result stability, not a problem
 > anymore (see from jupyter notebook)

- Synapse, Ziqi has an account

- Need to plan for the figures, how to arrange the panels, and what
 > panels we want to include.

P.S. Short meeting with Anniina to discuss Angela's thesis; Meet on Sept
1st for Ziqi's PhD application

Tribus = SOM + scoring function

- We need a way to suggest how to generate logic tables

- Use the markers that work well (plot the distributions)

 - Plot the distribution within the immune/etc cell types as a
 > diagnostic report

 - If it looks bad then go back to adjust the analysis

- We need a way to keep "other" cell type, maybe harsh threshold

- Check how the quality SOM is with all markers or only the markers in
 > logic table

For STELLAR: Either merge B and plasma cells, or adjust the logic table
(remove -1s from the common markers)

Ideas:

Useful tips on designing the logic table (eg. correlation matrix, filter
out highly correlated markers)

Include a diagnostics step (after som clustering evaluation) →
Suggestion (put it to the instructions, run this script to see if it
help with building the logic table)

Work with Inga-maria
